title: The Complete Pokédex Dataset (Gen I–IX)
subtitle: All 1,025 Pokémon: stats, types, abilities, evolutions & artwork
description:
# The Complete Pokédex Dataset

Every **released Pokémon — all 1,025 species** from Generation I (Red/Green) through Generation IX (Scarlet/Violet and its DLC), #0001 Bulbasaur to #1025 Pecharunt.

`data/pokemon.csv` (UTF-16, tab-separated) has **55 columns** per Pokémon: National number, generation, English & Japanese names, primary/secondary type, classification, exact gender ratios, height, weight, capture rate, egg steps, the six base stats, up to four abilities (incl. hidden), the 18 `against_*` type-matchup multipliers, sub-legendary/legendary/mythical flags, the evolution chain with triggers, Gigantamax and Mega Evolution forms (including the Legends: Z-A / Mega Dimension Megas), and the official Pokédex description.

Bundled imagesets: **small_images** (official artwork, 215×215), **large_images** (high-resolution artwork up to 1280×1280), and **alt_images** (regional forms, Mega Evolutions, Gigantamax, and other variant forms).

See the column metadata below for a full data dictionary. Built with a documented, reproducible scraper (`pokedex.ipynb`).
userSpecifiedSources: Serebii.net (stats/breeding/legendary status), the official Pokémon website pokemon.com (Pokédex descriptions), and Bulbapedia (artwork). Compiled with the reproducible scraper in pokedex.ipynb.

resources.description: All 1,025 Pokémon (Gen I–IX) with 55 fields: identity, types, base stats, abilities, gender ratios, breeding, type matchups, legendary flags, evolution chains, Mega/Gigantamax forms, and official Pokédex descriptions. UTF-16, tab-separated.

fields.name: national_number
fields.description: National Pokédex number (1–1025), unique per species.

fields.name: gen
fields.description: Generation the Pokémon was introduced (I–IX; #899–905 are Legends: Arceus additions, still Gen VIII).

fields.name: english_name
fields.description: English species name.

fields.name: japanese_name
fields.description: Romanized Japanese (rōmaji) name.

fields.name: primary_type
fields.description: Primary type of the primary form.

fields.name: secondary_type
fields.description: Secondary type of the primary form (blank for mono-typed Pokémon).

fields.name: classification
fields.description: Species category from the most recent Pokédex (e.g. "Seed Pokémon").

fields.name: percent_male
fields.description: Percentage of the species that is male (blank if genderless); exact species ratio, a multiple of 12.5.

fields.name: percent_female
fields.description: Percentage of the species that is female (blank if genderless).

fields.name: height_m
fields.description: Height in metres.

fields.name: weight_kg
fields.description: Weight in kilograms.

fields.name: capture_rate
fields.description: Base capture rate (string; a few species list two values, e.g. Minior).

fields.name: base_egg_steps
fields.description: Steps required to hatch an egg (hatch cycles × 256).

fields.name: hp
fields.description: Base HP stat.

fields.name: attack
fields.description: Base Attack stat.

fields.name: defense
fields.description: Base Defense stat.

fields.name: sp_attack
fields.description: Base Special Attack stat.

fields.name: sp_defense
fields.description: Base Special Defense stat.

fields.name: speed
fields.description: Base Speed stat.

fields.name: abilities_0
fields.description: First regular ability.

fields.name: abilities_1
fields.description: Second regular ability (blank if none).

fields.name: abilities_2
fields.description: Third regular ability (blank if none).

fields.name: abilities_hidden
fields.description: Hidden ability (blank if none).

fields.name: against_normal
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Normal-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_fire
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Fire-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_water
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Water-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_electric
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Electric-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_grass
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Grass-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_ice
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Ice-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_fighting
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Fighting-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_poison
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Poison-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_ground
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Ground-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_flying
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Flying-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_psychic
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Psychic-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_bug
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Bug-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_rock
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Rock-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_ghost
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Ghost-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_dragon
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Dragon-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_dark
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Dark-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_steel
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Steel-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: against_fairy
fields.description: Type-chart damage multiplier taken from a Fairy-type move (pure type-chart value; abilities not applied).

fields.name: is_sublegendary
fields.description: 1 if the Pokémon is sub-legendary, else 0.

fields.name: is_legendary
fields.description: 1 if the Pokémon is legendary, else 0.

fields.name: is_mythical
fields.description: 1 if the Pokémon is mythical, else 0.

fields.name: evochain_0
fields.description: Evolution chain: first stage name.

fields.name: evochain_1
fields.description: Evolution chain: trigger from stage 0 to stage 2.

fields.name: evochain_2
fields.description: Evolution chain: second stage name.

fields.name: evochain_3
fields.description: Evolution chain: trigger from stage 2 to stage 4.

fields.name: evochain_4
fields.description: Evolution chain: third stage name.

fields.name: evochain_5
fields.description: Evolution chain: additional trigger (branched/regional chains).

fields.name: evochain_6
fields.description: Evolution chain: additional stage name (branched/regional chains).

fields.name: gigantamax
fields.description: Gigantamax form name if the Pokémon is Gigantamax-capable, else blank.

fields.name: mega_evolution
fields.description: Mega Evolution form name if Mega-capable (incl. Legends: Z-A / Mega Dimension), else blank.

fields.name: mega_evolution_alt
fields.description: Second Mega form for Pokémon with two Mega Evolutions (e.g. Mega Charizard Y).

fields.name: description
fields.description: Pokédex description from the official Pokémon website.
